title: cynodendron nitidum
intro: Cynodendron nitidum, also known as the "tree hibiscus" or "ma'o hau hele", is a flowering plant native to Hawaii and other Pacific Island nations, belonging to the hibiscus family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cynodendron nitidum include relief from skin irritations, wounds, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as potential antiviral and antiparasitic effects. Herbal preparations of Cynodendron nitidum can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for medicinal use.
